productTruth.currentPromise: One local MCPace endpoint, simpler install on selected local clients, and honest diagnostics for what is configured versus actually usable.
productTruth.firstICP: advanced integrator / solo power user with 2-3 local MCP clients and hand-maintained config drift
productTruth.productShape: local-first control plane plus onboarding layer with a connectable local MCP endpoint and preview runtime lanes

provenToday: mcpace client install <surface> or mcpace client export <surface> succeeds
a real client completes initialize -> tools/list against that localhost endpoint
betaTruthRequires: MCPace resolves session and project ownership correctly
at least one upstream tool call succeeds without stale-result or ownership confusion

outOfScopeNextTwoQuarters: public cloud relay as a supported product lane
enterprise or team policy as the main story
long-tail client-surface breadth beyond the catalog-driven proof-tier plan
remote/local SKU splitting before the local runtime slice is proven

claimStatusLegend.supported: Safe to describe as working now inside the current repo proof boundary.
claimStatusLegend.supported-local-only: Working for documented local lanes, but not a broad cross-surface guarantee.
claimStatusLegend.control-plane-only: Read/lifecycle/control behavior exists, but not the live runtime semantics implied by the larger capability name.
claimStatusLegend.bootstrap-only: Bootstrap or attach proof exists, but not live forwarding.
claimStatusLegend.connectable-preview: Users can reach a visible MCPace endpoint or contract, but runtime/session/host proof is still incomplete.
claimStatusLegend.requires-host-proof: Source-level behavior exists, but the support claim waits on real supported hosts.
claimStatusLegend.planned: Not yet strong enough to expose as working behavior.

buildProof.reason: Rust host proof was not executed by this report script

runtimeProof.reason: runtime proof was not executed by this report script

missing: real-host runtime validation before public release claims
vendored binary bundle for at least one supported target
